acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux host command is documented and runnable from Nix.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/LINUX_VIDEO_SMOKE_HOST_PREFLIGHT.md documents Nix-wrapped commands; nix-command-validation.log records madobectl running from Nix.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Host environment, GPU/driver, Hyprland/PipeWire availability, host IP or port, and firewall state are recorded under evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: host-env.txt, gpu-driver.txt, hyprland-availability.txt, pipewire-availability.txt, network-firewall.txt, and host-preflight-summary.json record the requested state.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Sample artifact hash and expected stream/sample source are recorded.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: sample-hash.txt and host-preflight-summary.json record evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/sample-av1.ivf with SHA-256 51945e4cd903e28019fbbfbe74572b5d836f6ef1184cb782b142aba1d5201875.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Start/stop logs are captured without requiring Mac decode/render.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: start-stop.log records the create/remove attempt and the unavailable live Hyprland session from this shell.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence explicitly excludes Mac decode, Metal render, Mac presentation, and latency claims.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: notes.md, host-preflight-summary.json, and docs/LINUX_VIDEO_SMOKE_HOST_PREFLIGHT.md list the excluded claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Linux host preflight evidence was captured on the Linux host. Live Hyprland lifecycle was attempted and recorded as unavailable from this shell; the node only requires preflight evidence and makes no Mac decode/render/presentation or latency claim.
